label_i18n.es: Factor de Restricción de la Junta

rules: All numeric inputs must be positive numbers.

suggestedActions: Verify calculations with FEA or physical testing.
Use appropriate safety factors for design.

description.short: Calculate normal stress in linear elastic region using Hooke's Law.
description.long: Calculate normal stress in linear elastic region using Hooke's Law.

short_i18n.en: Calculate normal stress in linear elastic region using Hooke's Law.
short_i18n.tr: Lineer elastik bölgedeki normal gerilmeyi Hooke Yasası ile hesaplar.
short_i18n.de: Berechnen Sie die Normalspannung im linear-elastischen Bereich nach dem Hookeschen Gesetz.
short_i18n.fr: Calculer la contrainte normale dans la région élastique linéaire en utilisant la loi de Hooke.
short_i18n.es: Calcular el esfuerzo normal en la región elástica lineal usando la Ley de Hooke.
short_i18n.ar: احسب الإجهاد الطبيعي في المنطقة المرنة الخطية باستخدام قانون هوك.
